author: claude

patch.value: The 'Verify bun install of published package' step is fatal (exit 1 after 5x30s) and ordered before 'Create GitHub release'. bun's registry mirror can lag past that 2.5-min window, worst for prerelease (-N) versions, even after npm publish + git tag + changelog commit succeed. This blocked pm-changelog 2026.6.13-1's GitHub release. Fix adds an npm-authoritative fallback.
Harden release bun-verify so registry-mirror lag cannot block the GitHub release
Make the Daily Release resilient to bun registry-mirror lag so a cosmetic verify failure never blocks the actual GitHub release.

bun-verify retries 8x then falls back to authoritative 'npm view pkg@version'; npm-confirmed publishes emit ::warning:: and exit 0 so Create GitHub release runs; only a genuinely-absent npm version fails the job; release:check+test pass; no secrets.
release.yml verify step exits 0 on npm-confirmed publishes despite bun mirror lag; GitHub release is created.

value.author: claude
value.text: Lead repo for the fleet-wide fix; identical release.yml verify block exists in all active pm repos.

value.author: claude
value.text: pm-changelog 2026.6.13-1 GitHub release was missing and backfilled manually before this fix.

value.author: claude
value.text: Calendar -N suffixes are semver prereleases; bun resolves prerelease specifiers via a mirror that lags npm publish,so the verify smoke test is the flakiest for -N releases.

message: Track CI release-pipeline hardening for the fleet-wide bun-verify ordering defect

value.author: pi-agent
value.text: Verified done 2026-07-18: .github/workflows/release.yml contains the npm-authoritative fallback (npm view fallback after bun-verify retries). This repo was the origin of the fix (pm-changelog#49), propagated fleet-wide 2026-06-14; multiple successful Daily Releases since (latest July 2026). Acceptance criteria met.

patch.value: release.yml verify step falls back to authoritative npm view after bun-verify retries
Fallback shipped fleet-wide 2026-06-14; Daily Releases green since (verified 2026-07-18)
npm-authoritative bun-verify fallback shipped; acceptance criteria met
